notes: Acted-as-LLM (Claude Opus 4.7 in-session) for POC + query generation per D3-main spec.
First POC passed verifier-v1 strictly on the first try; no regen needed (poc_regens=0).

Query compiled cleanly on first synthesis. compile_iters=2 = first eval was silent (acquire was in while-condition, not body), so one refine iteration was applied broadening 'exprInsideStmt' to 'exprInLoop' (handles loop header expressions). After repair, oracle PASS: fires once at POC.c:116 inside ssi_probe_buggy (the leaking 'goto out3') and silent on ssi_probe_fixed.
POC frozen with chmod 444 and sha256 recorded in experiments/rq3/poc-sha.json under key '9a2ea132df86-rep3-C1'.
qlpack.yml scaffolding written next to query.ql so 'codeql query compile' resolves codeql/cpp-all dependency.
